infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: FieldLens uses your camera to analyze your work technique and provide real-time coaching feedback.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: FieldLens uses your microphone for voice coaching instructions.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: FieldLens saves coaching session recordings to your photo library.

plugins.microphonePermission: FieldLens uses the microphone for voice coaching.
